verdicts.issue: year=2021 + edition=6th is wrong. The 6th edition of Computer Architecture: A Quantitative Approach was published in 2017, not 2021. Either year must become 2017 or edition must be updated. Citations of [@patterson2021hardware] would render with the wrong year.

suggested_fix.qmd_propagation: Search vol1+vol2 .qmd for [@patterson2021hardware] and replace with [@patterson2017hardware]

verdicts.issue: publisher = {MLSys} is the conference acronym, not a publisher. Per §3 publisher rules, MLSys proceedings are published by mlsys.org. Replace value or drop field.

suggested_fix.booktitle: Proceedings of Machine Learning and Systems (MLSys)

verdicts.issue: @inproceedings entry contains both `journal` and `booktitle` fields. The `journal` field should be removed since this is a conference paper. booktitle also has a typo: 'Fairness Accountability and Transparency' (missing comma) vs canonical 'Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency'.

suggested_fix.booktitle: Proceedings of the 2022 ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT)

verdicts.issue: booktitle is `International Conference on Machine Learning` — per §2 venue expansion rule should be `International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML)` with the acronym in parentheses.
@inproceedings entry contains both `journal` and `booktitle`. The `journal` field should be removed.

Duplicate of `rajbhandari2020zero`. Both describe the ZeRO paper at SC20 with the same DOI (10.1109/SC41405.2020.00024). Also key uses non-standard CamelCase. Decide which to keep and propagate to .qmd citations.

suggested_fix.qmd_propagation: Search vol1+vol2 .qmd for [@Rajbhandari2020] and replace with [@rajbhandari2020zero]; then delete this entry

verdicts.issue: title field omits the actual subtitle; uses bare `Actionable Auditing` while subtitle field has the rest. Title should combine to 'Actionable Auditing: Investigating the Impact of Publicly Naming Biased Performance Results of Commercial AI Products'. Also missing year field (only date present).

suggested_fix.title: Actionable Auditing: {Investigating} the Impact of Publicly Naming Biased Performance Results of Commercial {AI} Products

verdicts.issue: title is `Closing the AI accountability gap` (lowercase 'accountability gap', AI not protected). Subtitle field separately holds `defining an end-to-end framework for internal algorithmic auditing`. Combine into one title and protect AI casing. Also missing year field.

suggested_fix.title: Closing the {AI} Accountability Gap: {Defining} an End-to-End Framework for Internal Algorithmic Auditing

verdicts.issue: Mixed schema: @article with both `journal = {arXiv preprint arXiv:1606.05250}` and `booktitle = {Proceedings of the 2016 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing}`. Should be either @article (arxiv preprint) or @inproceedings (EMNLP). Given the DOI is the EMNLP one (10.18653/v1/d16-1264), this should be @inproceedings.

title is just `Snorkel`; subtitle field has `rapid training data creation with weak supervision`. Combine to full title 'Snorkel: Rapid Training Data Creation with Weak Supervision'. Missing year field (only date).

suggested_fix.title: Snorkel: Rapid Training Data Creation with Weak Supervision

verdicts.issue: title is just `Snorkel MeTaL`; subtitle field has `Weak Supervision for Multi-Task Learning`. Combine to 'Snorkel MeTaL: Weak Supervision for Multi-Task Learning'. Also @inproceedings with both journal and booktitle. Missing year field.

suggested_fix.title: Snorkel {MeTaL}: Weak Supervision for Multi-Task Learning

verdicts.issue: title is just `"Why Should I Trust You?"`; subtitle field has `Explaining the Predictions of Any Classifier`. Combine to '"Why Should I Trust You?": Explaining the Predictions of Any Classifier'. Missing year field.

suggested_fix.title: "Why Should I Trust You?": {Explaining} the Predictions of Any Classifier

verdicts.issue: Key year `2021` does not match entry date `2022-05-30` (IWCMC 2022 conference). Per §5 key/year token must match entry year. Rename key to `razilov2022riscv` (using actual first author surname).

suggested_fix.qmd_propagation: Search vol1+vol2 .qmd for [@RISCV2021] and replace with [@razilov2022riscv]

verdicts.issue: @inproceedings entry has `journal = {ICLR}` (wrong field) plus `booktitle = {International Conference on Learning Representations}`. Drop the journal field. Also booktitle should be expanded per §2 to include `(ICLR)`.

Author names are incorrect. Entry lists `Seo, Sunwoo and Shin, Wonhyeok and Lee, Junhyeok` but the actual arXiv:2312.09588 paper lists `Eunbin Seo, Gwanjun Shin, Eunho Lee`. Silent corruption — citations would render with wrong first names.

suggested_fix.author: Seo, Eunbin and Shin, Gwanjun and Lee, Eunho

verdicts.issue: @article entry has both `journal = {CoRR}` and `booktitle = {arXiv preprint arXiv:1802.05799}`. arxiv preprints should be @article with one journal/eprint reference, not duplicated across journal+booktitle. Drop the booktitle field.

Key year `2009` does not match entry date `2012` (Morgan & Claypool synthesis lecture). Per §5 the key year token must match entry year. The entry mixes the 2009 UW-Madison tech report (volume 1648 hint, journal field) with the 2012 book (DOI/ISBN/date). Decide which is canonical.

suggested_fix.qmd_propagation: If keeping book: search vol1+vol2 .qmd for [@settles2009active] and replace with [@settles2012active]

verdicts.issue: Author names wrong. Entry lists `Shazeer, Noam and Mirhoseini, Azalia and Maziarz, Piotr and others` but actual ICLR 2017 authors are Noam Shazeer, Azalia Mirhoseini, Krzysztof Maziarz, Andy Davis, Quoc Le, Geoffrey Hinton, Jeff Dean. Wrong first name for Maziarz (Krzysztof, not Piotr); `and others` should be expanded.

suggested_fix.author: Shazeer, Noam and Mirhoseini, Azalia and Maziarz, Krzysztof and Davis, Andy and Le, Quoc and Hinton, Geoffrey and Dean, Jeff

verdicts.issue: Key starts with `sheng` but the first author's surname is `Shen` (first name `Sheng`). Per §5 the key surname token must match the first author's surname. Also key year is 2019 (preprint year) but entry year is 2020 (AAAI publication) — within tolerance.

suggested_fix.qmd_propagation: Search vol1+vol2 .qmd for [@sheng2019qbert] and replace with [@shen2020qbert]

verdicts.issue: Key year `2006` does not match entry date `2012-01-02`. The DOI `10.1002/9781119201731` is the 2nd edition (2012). The 1st edition was 2006. Either rename key to `siddiqi2012credit` (matching content/DOI) or restore the 2006 1st edition metadata.

suggested_fix.qmd_propagation: Search vol1+vol2 .qmd for [@siddiqi2006credit] and replace with [@siddiqi2012credit]

verdicts.issue: @article with both `journal = {arXiv preprint}` (no number — missing arxiv ID in journal) and `booktitle = {Proceedings of the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR)}`. Should be either @inproceedings (ICLR 2015) or @article (arxiv 1409.1556). Drop one. Also missing year field (only date present).

Duplicate of `rajpurkar2016squad`. Both cite the same Rajpurkar et al. 2016 SQuAD EMNLP paper. The key `squad_website` is misleading — it suggests a website citation but the entry is the conference paper. Decide which to keep.

suggested_fix.qmd_propagation: Search vol1+vol2 .qmd for [@squad_website] and replace with [@rajpurkar2016squad]; then delete this entry
